features: Specification: Get the kids excited and prepared for Christmas with this Elf Christmas Eve Bag Add a touch of Christmas magic with this adorable elf-themed gift sack — perfect for kids and families

perfect size: The bag is the perfect size for filling with little treats such as chocolate pyjamas and even reindeer food Fill it with pajamas toys books or sweet treats to make Christmas Eve extra special
elf design: It features a full colour printed elf design with a gold lace draw string Features a fun and colorful print that brings festive cheer to your home and looks great under the tree

Reusable Keepsake: Made from sturdy, eco-friendly material — a beautiful alternative to disposable wrapping that can be cherished year after year This is a great way of creating an annual tradition; re-use the bag again and again in years to come

Festive Elf Christmas Eve Bag: Add a touch of Christmas magic with this adorable elf-themed gift sack — perfect for kids and families Each bag features a charming elf design lovingly made to capture the joy and anticipation of Christmas Eve
